generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder measuring angular position on the motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder measuring angular position behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for torque calculation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling, SimulinkSimulation
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling, SimulinkSimulation
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current (I_M) data for torque derivation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ_M) derived from motor current (I_M) using motor constants"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance SimulatedFrictionOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction model outputs from Simulink processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData, SecondaryEncoderPositionData, MotorCurrentData, TorqueData, AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance AASAssetModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for describing physical assets of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SinumerikController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, and acceleration inputs"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor converting current (I_M) to torque (τ_M)"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the transmission system"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transforming rotational energy via torque transmission"
]

instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for systems engineering modeling (Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation of friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset integration and description"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of simulated vs. reference data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of simulated vs. reference data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model-based control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss detection insights used to adjust control algorithms for enhanced motion accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of simulated vs reference data for monitoring"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model-based control adjustments for enhanced motion accuracy based on friction insights"
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SinumerikController, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow operates as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only, as defined by Kritzinger et al. [32], with no autonomous data pushing back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data streamed via MQTT; friction models updated continuously during operation to reflect dynamic conditions such as load, temperature, and wear."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating physical robot axis, sensor data via MQTT, SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, AAS for asset context, and dashboard for unified visualization of friction analysis and motion accuracy improvement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') with continuous data collection during robot operation for friction modeling and motion correction, not designed or manufactured phase."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data (from Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre models) against reference data from sensors to validate friction models; deviations used to improve motion accuracy, with error analysis for model calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position, torque, angular velocity) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset description and SysML for systems engineering modeling, aligned with Industrie 4.0 standards."
]
